title: Wallet connected to the wrong Sui network
userPrompt: My Sui wallet is connected but the dapp keeps rejecting me. The wallet is using a different Sui network than the app and I cannot create a task.

expected.summary: The user wallet is connected to the wrong blockchain network for the dapp.
expected.suggestedResolution: Ask the user to switch the wallet to the configured Sui network and retry the action.

mockResponse: {"category":"NETWORK_CONFIGURATION","severity":"low","requiresHuman":false,"summary":"The wallet is on the wrong Sui network.","suggestedResolution":"Switch the wallet to the required Sui network and try again.","confidence":0.91}

title: Not enough balance to submit a transaction
userPrompt: Every correction submission fails before confirmation. The wallet shows almost zero SUI and the transaction never gets sent.

expected.summary: The user lacks enough SUI to pay gas and submit the transaction.
expected.suggestedResolution: Tell the user to fund the wallet with enough SUI for gas, then retry the correction submission.

mockResponse: {"category":"TRANSACTION_STUCK","severity":"medium","requiresHuman":false,"summary":"The transaction is taking too long to finish.","suggestedResolution":"Wait for more confirmations before retrying.","confidence":0.88}

title: Transaction stays pending for hours
userPrompt: I created a task but the transaction result has not appeared for two hours. The wallet returned a digest, but the task still does not show up on Sui.

expected.summary: The transaction digest exists, but the app has not observed the expected Sui effects or object changes.
expected.suggestedResolution: Recommend checking the digest in a Sui explorer, confirming the selected network, and retrying only after verifying the original transaction status.

mockResponse: {"category":"TRANSACTION_STUCK","severity":"medium","requiresHuman":false,"summary":"The app has not observed the transaction result yet.","suggestedResolution":"Check the transaction digest and selected Sui network before retrying.","confidence":0.41}

title: Suspicious transaction request
userPrompt: A user connected a Sui wallet to claim an airdrop and the site asked them to sign a transaction that transfers unfamiliar coins and objects. They want to know if it is safe.

expected.summary: The user is facing a likely phishing or malicious Sui transaction request.
expected.suggestedResolution: Tell the user not to sign, disconnect from the site, review the transaction commands and wallet activity, and escalate for immediate human review.

mockResponse: This looks dangerous. Category=scam risk. Ask a human to review it immediately.

title: Browser wallet extension not detected
userPrompt: The app says no wallet is installed, but the user thought they had a Sui-compatible wallet extension already. They cannot connect at all.

expected.summary: The browser does not expose a usable wallet provider to the dapp.
expected.suggestedResolution: Ask the user to install or re-enable the wallet extension and refresh the browser before reconnecting.

mockResponse: {"category":"WALLET_CONNECTION","severity":"low","requiresHuman":false,"summary":"The dapp cannot detect a wallet provider in the browser.","suggestedResolution":"Install or re-enable the wallet extension and refresh the page.","confidence":0.84}

title: Move call aborts with an error
userPrompt: A correction submission reaches the Sui Move package, but transaction simulation aborts with an error. The user needs next steps.

expected.summary: The on-chain action is aborting because of a Move validation or object-state error.
expected.suggestedResolution: Capture the Move abort details, inspect the input objects and transaction payload, and escalate to a developer or operator for investigation.

mockResponse: {"category":"CONTRACT_ERROR","severity":"medium","requiresHuman":true,"summary":"The Move call aborted during execution.","suggestedResolution":"Check the abort details and inspect the input objects before retrying.","confidence":0.79}
